title: Morning Sickness Solutions: 7 Herbal Teas for Multiparous Women
description: Zingiber officinale teas, also known as ginger teas, have been traditionally used to help alleviate morning sickness. The active compounds in ginger, such as gingerol and shogaol, are responsible for its medicinal properties. These compounds have natural anti-inflammatory and anti-emetic properties, which help to soothe the stomach and reduce nausea. When consumed as a tea, ginger has been shown to slow down digestion, prevent stomach contents from moving back up into the esophagus, an...
